response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief, early-career C++ exposure in academic and minor professional contexts, making them a poor fit for the core technical requirements.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and mentoring via workshops
Proven ability to build and deploy distributed systems (Kubernetes, CI/CD)
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience, far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or large-scale distributed systems design
Lacks documented experience in technical leadership roles mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers
